headline: FedEx Earnings Beat Pairs With Network 2.0 Closures And Valuation Upside
summary: FedEx (NYSE:FDX) reported fiscal third quarter results that outperformed expectations. The company raised its full year outlook following the quarter. FedEx announced plans to close numerous shipping facilities as part of its Network 2.0 consolidation initiative. The initiative includes a permanent reduction in the company’s facility footprint. FedEx is at the center of global parcel, freight, and express shipping, so changes to its network matter for how goods move worldwide. The Network...
